title: MBS-Lang OSS/HPC endpoint dry run
evidence_boundary: This is endpoint readiness documentation only. No OSS/HPC endpoint was reachable, no raw responses were collected, no evidence pack was created, and no OSS/HPC model pass/fail claim is made.
required_for_real_evidence: Start a reachable OpenAI-compatible endpoint exposing /v1/models and /v1/chat/completions.
Use a real served model id instead of the placeholder.
Use --classification oss for local/open OSS endpoints or --classification hpc for HPC-served models.
Publish only sanitized aggregates unless raw responses are scrubbed and intentionally released.
